title: Powder Snow Outline
description: is a subtle texture pack that improves the visibility of loose snow in Minecraft by adding a slight edge highlight. This makes layers of snow easier to spot without compromising the vanilla style.

This texture pack adds a **soft, subtle outline** to the **powder snow block**, making it easier to spot without breaking the original Minecraft aesthetic.

##  Features
- Minimal, light outline for better visibility  
- Keeps the original vanilla style intact  
- Perfect for survival to avoid accidental falls  
- Fully compatible with other packs that only modify block textures

##  Game Version
Designed for **Minecraft Java Edition**  
Compatibility: 1.21+ (also works on newer versions)

##  Why Use It?
Powder snow can be tricky to notice ‚ÄĒ this pack helps you identify it quickly, without any exaggerated visuals. Great for players who value both **clarity and aesthetics**.

Enjoy the game!
